data.name: Best Friends
data.detailed_description:
How strong is a bond between two childhood friends?

This adult visual novel, allows you to take the role of one of two Geordie lads as they prepare for the next chapter of life as they finish school and head to university.

But one has been keeping a big secret from his best mate.

Will their friendship end when the secret is uncovered?

Or will it flourish?

Watch the story unfold through the eyes of either friend in this trans positive, fully 3D rendered, adult kinetic novel.

Experience their journey through discovery of themselves, each other, their family, friends and other people they meet along the way. 

Please note this is a KINETIC NOVEL, which means it was intentionally written with limited choices, this is not a create your own adventure type of experience.

Watch the story unfold through the eyes of either friend in this trans positive, fully 3D rendered, adult kinetic novel.

Experience their journey through discovery of themselves, each other, their family, friends and other people they meet along the way. 

Please note this is a KINETIC NOVEL, which means it was intentionally written with limited choices, this is not a create your own adventure type of experience.
data.short_description: Trans positive adult only visual novel that follows two best friends as they begin life at university. Play as either friend and watch the deep story unfold.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher.
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
